items.material: Providing and fixing under-deck & wall acoustic insulation as 4 mm thick sound deadener having density 900–1100 kg/m³ with minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 20 dB as per ASTM E-90, over which 50 mm White wool packed in readymade bag made of aluminum foil. White wool shall have density of 64 kg/m3 with tolerance as per IS: 14656/IS: 15402. Material shall have minimum NRC(Noise Reduction Coefficient) 0.70 as per ASTM C 423. The material shall have minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 10 dB as per ASTM E90. Base material shall have fire class A as per ASTM E 84. First layer of 4mm sound deadner shall be fixed on wall with the help of adhesive and necessary mechanical accesories and above it 50 mm thick Encapsulated bag shall be fixed with the help of screw washers and GI wire and needed mechanical accessories and the application shall be carried out strictly as per approved guidelines and instructions of the site supervisor.

Providing and fixing outdoor noise barrier with brick wall support with metal framing, including 8 mm (2 layer of 4 mm) thick sound deadener having density 900–1100 kg/m³ with minimum STC (Sound Transmission Class) 20 dB as per ASTM E-90(for 4 mm thick), over which 100 mm thick Mineral Wool of density 140 kg/m³ with minimum NRC(Noise Reduction Coefficient) 0.90 as per ASTM C 423 shall be installed, followed by a fiberglass tissue layer for moisture protection. The inner 28G Aluminum sheet facing the cooling tower shall be perforated to enhance sound absorption. The entire assembly shall be securely fixed on the brick wall structure using suitable mechanical accessories, and installation shall be carried out strictly as per approved guidelines and instructions of the site supervisor.

Custom Fabrication and Installation of Aluminum based noise diffractors to be mounted on the top of noise barrier assembly with diffraction achieved comparable to 2 m of wall height. The diffractor shall be 0.20 meters in height and shall be able to acheive 4 dB noise reduction. It should be modular in design of width approximately 1m.

Furnish and install acoustic louvers shall be preferably made of 16 gauge galvanized steel. Louver splitter blades (baffles) shall be airfoil configuration and preferably made of 22 gauge galvanized steel. They should be packed with inert, vermin & moisture proof mineral fiber and povide STC of minimum 15 dB as per ASTM E-90. Inclusion of Bird screen on one side is preferred. The aerodynamic performance shall be 500 fpm for 0.30 i.w.g. static pressure drop and upto 1000 fpm for 1.25 i.w.g. static pressure drop.
19 mm thick insulation for supply air ducts
13 mm thick insulation for return / exhaust air ducts
